notes: Their main damage was The Fey (34k magical); 1/5 of you itemized magic resist — that hurt.
Enemy ran 3/5 on or near their meta core.

draftNote: 2 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Willy Guggenheim (offlane→jungle), Xeebs (carry→jungle).

coaching.headline: You held more Primal Fangtooths than they did, then lost every fight that mattered to Shinbi and The Fey.
coaching.team: You actually controlled the late objective board — you took Fangtooth at 6, 13 and 18 and Primal Fangtooth at 24 and 29 — but it didn't matter because you lost the team fights around them. The decisive one was the 13.6 Fangtooth fight (2-4) that gave Shinbi and The Fey the early lead, and the game ended on a 32.2 fight at their Orb Prime (1-3). In between, a bad trade at their half (22.4, 1-4) and a 24.2 loss on your own Primal Fangtooth (0-2) kept the bleeding going. The Fey (34k magical) was their carry and only one of you built magic resist. Towers: 3 to their 9. Taking objectives is good — but you have to win the fight first, and you kept contesting majors without the bodies to hold them.
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Losing the 13.6 Fangtooth fight (2-4) early to Shinbi and The Fey, then the 32.2 Orb Prime fight (1-3) — you took the camps but never the fights, with only 1 of 5 building magic resist vs 34k.

perPlayer.7c8ab99c-31c5-4ea5-a6fa-e0d6417c3f1b: Boris was the unfavored jungle (theirs all game vs Shinbi) and 8 deaths showed it. You front the 13.6 Fangtooth loss that set the tone, and you carried no magic resist into a 4-magical comp — that's why you melted. As the engage you have to pick winnable fights; into a fed Shinbi with the wrong build, those weren't.
perPlayer.16f28434-561f-4f23-9454-40321f4a1ef3: Iggy & Scorch put up real numbers (23k hero damage, 20k to objectives) but died 6 times. Your zone damage helped take the camps; the issue is you kept being present for the lost fights (13.6, 32.2). As a setup mid your value is area denial from range, not trading into The Fey in the fights you couldn't win.
perPlayer.a0c393cc-1437-4bdc-8168-64676ce2166c: Zinx was the unfavored support (theirs all game vs Steel) and 6 deaths came from the lost team fights. Your Lunaria came at 27, too late to swing the early ones. As the support your reads matter most — after the 13.6 and 22.4 losses, the call was to stop contesting majors you couldn't hold and reset for vision.
perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Greystone was favored into Akeron but you finished 1/6 with 6 deaths — double your norm — and no magic resist into a 4-magical comp. You were in the 13.6 and 22.4 losses. As the favored frontline, the team needed you alive to peel The Fey; the build hole and the over-commits cost you both.
perPlayer.a412baf3-dd17-4f89-8ecf-9d0704f3a79e: Drongo was favored but your damage (443/min) was 25% under your norm and you went 4/6. You were in the 22.4 bad trade (1-4) at their half and the 24.2 loss on your own Primal Fangtooth. As the ranged carry, your damage has to be online and safe in those objective fights — you were neither, and a favored lane went to waste.
